name: @byn/cli
description: Reserved scope for byn — a local-first secure secrets vault & credential manager (a Go CLI). Install the real CLI via `go install github.com/sandeepbaynes/byn/cmd/byn@latest`, Homebrew, or https://github.com/sandeepbaynes/byn. This package installs no executable.
author: Sandeep Baynes
